text: We initiate coverage on Alphabet Inc. with a Buy rating, supported by accelerating revenue growth, exceptional profitability metrics, and a fortress balance sheet. Q4 2025 revenue reached $113.9 billion with 11.29% year-over-year growth, representing an acceleration from prior quarterly rates. Profitability remains robust with operating margins above 31%, net margins exceeding 30%, and free cash flow conversion at 21.56%. The company maintains conservative leverage with a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.17x and strong liquidity positioning with a current ratio of 2.01x. Management's aggressive investment in generative AI capabilities, with R&D expenses totaling $18.6 billion in Q4 (16.31% of revenue), positions the company to compete in evolving technology landscapes.
